title: Eudema pycnophylloides
taxonomy: Eudema pycnophylloides is classified in the family Capparaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as capper or caper family. This family is a part of the Brassicales order, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Eudema pycnophylloides is native to tropical Africa, where it is often found in humid and shaded areas. The classification of Eudema pycnophylloides is still being researched and studied by botanists. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships of this plant.
